concerns.detail: Solicits real names of students who did not receive recommendation letters, encouraging disclosure of private individuals' identities
concerns.excerpt: 要是有谁没拿到信的看到了也来贴个名字, 咱就是看看谁在这扯淡

concerns.detail: Vulgar personal attack using excrement reference to insult other commenters rather than address advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 你们这些人脑子是有屎?

concerns.detail: Deletes substantive observations about a specific advisor's intern management (accepting excessive students, lack of guidance/resources), appearing to suppress legitimate criticism
concerns.excerpt: 她问题是不设限制的收，收大十个人，收来丢给学生管，无指导无资源，开会就问sota
